org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core

Class AgentIdentifier

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.AgentIdentifier
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<Identifier>, Identifier
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public class AgentIdentifier
extends Object
implements Identifier
    Unique identifier of an agent.

    The agent identifier must be unique along all the kernel which are accessible by this agent.

    This identifier is composed of two parts:

    • the kernel's identifier
      • where the agent was spawn for the first time; if the agent has migrated, this part does not reflect the kernel where the agent is currently run.
    • a unique identifier (see UUID)
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>
    See Also:

      • AgentIdentifier

        public AgentIdentifier(KernelIdentifier kernelId,

        Deprecated. 
        Spawn an existing identifier.
        Parameters:
        kernelId - is the kernel identifier where the agent was spawn for the first time.
        agentId - is the agent identifier computed by the kernel.

      • getKernelId

        public KernelIdentifier getKernelId()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the kernel's identifier part of this agent's identifier.

        The kernel identifier basically corresponds to the kernel that on which the agent was spawn for the first time.

        Returns:
        the identifier of the kernel on which the agent is located.

      • setStringRepresentation

        void setStringRepresentation(String str)
        Deprecated. 
        Set the string representation of this identifier.
        Parameters:
        str - is the string representation associated to this identifier.
